title: Cyrille Gossard

{{short description|France international rugby league footballer}} {{Use dmy dates|date=January 2023}} {{Infobox rugby league biography |name = Cyrille Gossard |fullname = Cyrille Gossard |image = Cyrille Gossard.JPG |image_size = 285 |position = {{rlp|SR}} |birth_date = {{birth date and age|1982|2|7|df=yes}} |birth_place = [[Perpignan]], [[Pyrénées-Orientales]],
[[Occitania (administrative region)|Occitania]], France |height = {{convert|1.87|m|ftin|abbr=on}} |weight = {{convert|104|kg|stlb|abbr=on}}{{cite web|url=http://www.catalansdragons.com/index.php?article=Gossard_Cyrille|title=Dragons Catalans|year=2011|work=web page|publisher=Dragons Catalans S.A.S.P|accessdate=11 June 2011}} |club1 = {{nowrap|[[Catalans Dragons]]}} |year1start = 2006 |year1end = 12 |appearances1 = 93 |tries1 = 9 |goals1 = 0 |fieldgoals1 = 0 |points1 = 36 |teamA = [[France national rugby league team|France]] |yearAstart = 2007 |yearAend = 11 |appearancesA = 9 |triesA = 1 |goalsA = 0 |fieldgoalsA = 0 |pointsA = 4 |updated = 2 November 2022 |source = [http://www.rugbyleagueproject.org/players/cyrille-gossard/summary.html Rugby League Project] |new = yes }} '''Cyril Gossard''' (born 7 February 1982) is a [[rugby league]] footballer who most recently played for the [[Catalans Dragons]] in the [[Super League]]. He plays as a {{rlp|sr}}. ==Background== Gossard was born in [[France]]. ==Career== Gossard made 93 appearances for Catalans between 2006 and 2012. In 2014, he became the head coach of St Esteve XIII Catalan. On 13 November 2015, Gossard stepped down as head coach of St Esteve XIII Catalan for personal reasons.{{cite web|url=https://www.skysports.com/rugby-league/news/12196/10065941/catalans-dragons-release-reserve-team-coach-cyrille-gossard/|title=Catalans Dragons release reserve-team coach Cyrille Gossard|publisher=Sky Sports}} ==References== {{reflist}} ==External links== {{2009 France Rugby League Four Nations squad}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Gossard, Cyril}} [[Category:1982 births]] [[Category:Living people]] [[Category:Catalans Dragons players]] [[Category:France national rugby league team players]] [[Category:French rugby league players]] [[Category:Rugby league second-rows]] [[Category:Rugby league players from Perpignan]] [[Category:21st-century French sportsmen]] {{France-rugbyleague-bio-stub}}
